positive: A whimsical and intricate forest creature, highly stylized silhouette design. The creature should blend elements of a fox, a deer, and abstract botanicals, standing dynamically in a balanced, symmetrical pose. The scene must feature rich, stylized jungle foliage, oversized leaves, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and elegant vines wrapping around the creature's form. Use a deep, jewel-toned color palette—sapphire blue, emerald green, and amethyst purple—with high contrast, making the silhouette pop against a slightly faded, mystical gradient background. Intricate linework, graphic illustration style, suitable for a clean, repeatable apparel print. Vector-art quality, central composition, clean outlines, high detail.
negative: low quality, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, solid color, grayscale
